texto: Everyone's screaming,I try to make a sound,But no one hears me

frase_original: Everyone's screaming,I try to make a sound,But no one hears me

texto: And tonight I'm feelin like an astronaut, sending sos from this tiny box,and i lost the signal when i lifted off, now i'm stuck up here and the world forgot, can i please come down? Cuz i'm tired of drifting round and round....can i please come down? Now I lie awake and scream in my zero gravity...and its starting to weigh down on me....lets abort this mission now....CAN I PLEASE COME DOWN? So tonight I'm calling all the astronauts, all the lonely people that the world forgot, if you hear my voice, come pick me up, cuz ur all i've got...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Simple Plan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “And tonight I'm feelin like an astronaut, sending sos from this tiny box,and i lost the signal wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, alone, cry pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
